scripts.android: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo run:android
scripts.ios: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo run:ios
scripts.prebuild: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo prebuild
scripts.prebuild:clean: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo prebuild --clean
scripts.build:dev:android: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.build:dev:ios: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.build:preview:android: pnpm -w run icons:generate && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:preview:ios: pnpm -w run icons:generate && eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.build:prod:android: pnpm -w run icons:generate && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.build:prod:ios: pnpm -w run icons:generate && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.build:local:android: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo prebuild --platform android && cp local.properties android/ && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:local:ios: pnpm -w run icons:generate -- --dev && APP_VARIANT=development expo prebuild --platform ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace SuperMail.xcworkspace -scheme SuperMail -configuration Release -archivePath build/SuperMail.xcarchive archive
